column1: TC-U9PYFC;Multiple file attachments can be associated with a single part;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/views/#attachments;boundary;part-views
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the 'Attachments' tab of 'PCB Assembly'
Then the Attachments tab displays all three files: 'schematic.pdf'
TC-YLY7XP;Attachments tab allows uploading and viewing file attachments;https://docs.inventree.org/en/latest/part/views/#attachments;positive;part-views
column2: attachments;"Given a part 'Sensor Module' exists with no attachments

column1: Given a user with part edit permission is logged in and on the 'Attachments' tab of 'Sensor Module'
When the user clicks the 'Add Attachment' button
When the user uploads a file named 'datasheet.pdf'
Then the Attachments tab displays 'datasheet.pdf' in the attachments list"
